description_long: This is a whimsical cake shaped and decorated to resemble a panda's head, with a smooth white exterior and black fondant details forming the panda's eyes, ears, and nose. The cake features a playful, rounded face with expressive black patches around the eyes and a small, smiling mouth. Atop the cake, a cluster of green, leafy decorations mimics a succulent plant, adding a vibrant contrast to the monochrome panda design. The surface appears to be covered in fondant, giving it a sleek and polished finish, while the leafy top is crafted from green-tinted icing or fondant. The cake is compact and single-tiered, with no visible candles or additional adornments. It is displayed without any plate or stand, resting directly on a flat surface.
description: A panda-shaped cake with black fondant details and a green succulent decoration on top, featuring a smooth, polished finish and playful facial features.
description_view_0: Front view shows the panda's face with black eyes, nose, and mouth, and the green succulent on top is clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the black ear and side stripe, with the succulent leaves extending over the top edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the cake, dominated by the green succulent and a single black patch.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the other black ear and stripe, with the panda's face partially visible and the succulent on top.
